userList.hint: Manage admin accounts, status switches, role assignments, and security actions.
userList.tableHint: Filter the current user list by account, status, and role.

unavailable.create: You do not have permission to create users

passwordPolicy.hint: Password requirement: at least 12 characters and include both letters and digits.
passwordPolicy.error: Password must be at least 12 characters and include both letters and digits.

userList.deleteConfirmDescription: Delete user {user}? This also revokes the user's sessions.

resetPasswordDialog.title: Reset User Password
resetPasswordDialog.description: Set a new password for {user}. After saving, the user must log in again and complete password change.

roleDialog.title: Manage User Roles
roleDialog.replaceSelectionCount: {count} roles will be kept after overwrite
roleDialog.selectionLoadFailed: Failed to load the current role snapshot. Retry before saving.
roleDialog.unsavedChangesConfirm: Role assignment changes have not been saved. Discard them?

batchOperationHint.replace: Replace overwrites each selected user's roles with the checked roles.
batchOperationHint.replaceEmpty: No roles selected. Saving replace will clear all roles for the selected users.
batchOperationHint.add: Add only appends the checked roles. Existing roles on selected users stay unchanged.
batchOperationHint.remove: Remove only detaches the checked roles. Other roles on selected users stay unchanged.

roleDialog.submitBlocked: Role changes are temporarily unavailable. Retry after refreshing the latest role data.
